name: Advanced Diagnosis Phase 11 - Supabase Cloud Sync for ADX Records
new_features: save final decision/outcome uploads to cloud when online
manual Sync Supabase and Pull cloud buttons in analytics panel
cloud pull merges records into localStorage
cloud delete on local record delete
auto sync on online event and app load
note: Run supabase_adx_records_table.sql once in Supabase SQL editor before cloud sync. If table is missing, app remains local-first and queues records.
